summary: PR #2494 updated Zebes Route stage code in src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.c by introducing named route light data, direct string/data references, and a C translation of grZebesRoute_8020B548, the stage light setup routine. The PR body reports a successful configure+ninja build and checkdiff score of 99.96923% for grZebesRoute_8020B548, with known remaining GXColor stack-temp offset drift. The bot report shows data-section improvements and grZebesRoute_8020B548 improving from 0.00% to 99.97%. No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; adds grZebesRoute_LightData, direct data/string definitions, and translates grZebesRoute_8020B548.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct grZebesRoute_LightData and const grZe_Route_803B83A0
human_pr_text: naming route light data, direct string/data references, translating stage light setup routine

what_changed.text: Added baselib/debug.h and baselib/lobj.h includes to support assert and HSD_LObj APIs used by the translated lighting routine.
Replaced the previous extern Vec3 grZe_Route_803B83A0 with a typed grZebesRoute_LightData struct containing player_pos, spot_pos, spot_interest, upper_point_pos, lower_point_pos, and pad fields.
Added direct data/string definitions for route stage metadata, assert/report strings, color constants, and float constants used by the route code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_Route_803E5E0C stage info struct with fmt field

what_changed.text: Changed grZebesRoute_8020B260 OSReport call from inline format and __FILE__ to direct references through grZe_Route_803E5E0C.fmt and grZe_Route_803E5E64.
Updated grZebesRoute_8020B42C to initialize its position from grZe_Route_803B83A0.player_pos and use named float constants for y clamp and x reset.

Translated grZebesRoute_8020B548 to iterate over up to three light objects after HSD_GObjGXLinkHead[4], identify spot versus point lights using LOBJ_TYPE_MASK, set color, position, interest, spot parameters, and distance attenuation using route data scaled by Ground_801C0498.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_LObjSetColor / HSD_LObjSetPosition / HSD_LObjSetInterest / HSD_LObjSetSpot / HSD_LObjSetDistAttn

smart_moves.text: Grouped related route light vectors into a typed struct instead of treating grZe_Route_803B83A0 as a single Vec3, making later use sites distinguish player, spot, interest, upper point, and lower point positions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_Route_803B83A0.player_pos / spot_pos / spot_interest / upper_point_pos / lower_point_pos

smart_moves.text: Used HSD_LObj APIs and LOBJ constants to express light-object operations rather than leaving the stage light setup routine as an unmatched stub.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_LObjGetNext, HSD_LObjGetPosition, HSD_LObjSetColor, HSD_LObjSetPosition, HSD_LObjSetInterest, HSD_LObjSetSpot, HSD_LObjSetDistAttn
text_corpus: bot report grZebesRoute_8020B548 improved from 0.00% to 99.97%

smart_moves.text: Documented the remaining mismatch narrowly: GXColor by-value stack temp offsets differ while surrounding control flow and Vec3 stack slots are aligned.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Known remaining drift for GXColor stack temp offsets 8/12/16 vs target 20/24/28

decomp_lessons.lesson: When an apparent single vector symbol is actually a packed data block used by multiple lighting roles, a small typed struct can expose the authored layout and make use sites clearer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: replacement of extern Vec3 grZe_Route_803B83A0 with grZebesRoute_LightData
raw_diff: field-specific uses in grZebesRoute_8020B42C and grZebesRoute_8020B548

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage light setup routines, translating around HSD_LObj traversal can combine type-mask dispatch, scaled route positions, and per-light attenuation/color setup while still leaving small stack-layout drift.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: while loop over lobj with LOBJ_TYPE_MASK branches
human_pr_text: checkdiff 99.96923% and GXColor stack temp offset drift

decomp_lessons.lesson: A near-match can be made reviewable when the PR explicitly records the exact unmatched area and verifier score, rather than claiming full function closure.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: known remaining GXColor offset drift

naming_conventions.lesson: Use a stage-prefixed semantic type name for recovered route lighting data when fields are directly supported by use sites.

naming_conventions.name: light_gobj, first_lobj, lobj, current_pos, light_type, spot_ref_dist, upper_ref_dist, lower_ref_dist, split_y
naming_conventions.lesson: Recovered locals use short role names tied to HSD_GObj/HSD_LObj traversal and lighting calculations.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Function translation with explicit verifier ledger
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR body reports configure+ninja and checkdiff for grZebesRoute_8020B548, with a 99.96923% score.
Remaining mismatch is attributed to three GXColor by-value stack temporary offsets, while control flow and Vec3 stack slots are reported aligned.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Loop over lights rather than manual repeated blocks
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The translated function uses while (i < 3 && lobj != NULL) to process light objects, matching the repeated light setup pattern by index and next pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: i = 0; while (i < 3 && lobj != NULL); i++; lobj = HSD_LObjGetNext(lobj)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Temporary padding local for stack shaping

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed route lighting data can clarify packed stage constants
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grzebesroute, PR #2494 replaced an extern Vec3 with grZebesRoute_LightData, exposing separate player, spot, interest, upper point, and lower point vectors used by the stage lighting setup. This is a useful example of recovering a small typed data layout when use sites support distinct roles.
